title: How a Solo Founder Bootstrapped 5 AI Products to $1M+/Month
description: Tibo Louis-Lucas on how he bootstrapped five AI products past $1M/month — why your job is to validate, not sell; the Typeframe-to-Rabbit pivot; SEO via per-tool landing pages; running it all lean; pricing premium to kill churn; and why shipping in quantity beats polishing one product.
